documentation.text: @notice Called by ReputationOracle or Recovery Agent to update on-chain reputation.
@notice Called by Recovery Agent after a verified attestation to update lifetime stats.
@notice Blacklist a collector for confirmed fraud. Only admin.

@title CorporateVault
 @notice Manages corporate buyer registration, PRC purchases, retirements,
         and the protocol payment pool that funds collector HBAR payouts.
         Protocol split (per spec §12.1):
           - 50% of PRC revenue → payment pool (collector payouts)
           - 13.5% → protocol treasury
           - 36.5% → payment pool reserve buffer

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (uint256,string memory,string memory) external returns (string memory)

documentation.text: @notice Check payment pool health. Healthy = pool covers 30+ days of payouts.

documentation.text: @dev Generate a unique certificate ID:  PC-{YEAR}-CORP-{NONCE:04}
@dev Tier thresholds (score)
@notice Update reputation stats for a collector and recompute score + tier.
@notice Batch update multiple collectors (gas-efficient weekly run)
@dev Payout multiplier in basis points: 10000 = 1.0x, 15000 = 1.5x

@dev Approximate log10(kg+1)*40, integer result, max 40.
      Uses bit-length: log2(n) ≈ bitLen(n)-1, then log10 ≈ log2/3.32
@notice Admin-only: approve a station after physical verification.
@notice Slash a station's stake on confirmed fraud. Called by admin or Recovery Agent.
@notice Station operator updates their calibration certificate annually.
@notice Increment attestation nonce to prevent replay attacks.
@notice Returns true only when station is fully active, staked, and calibration is current.
